## עָב (id: 005193000000000)

עָב
===

עָב (H5645 · H5646)

noun · עוב

Clouds

cloud \= mass of visible, condensed watery vapor floating in the air; ► producing rain; ≈ God is said to envelop himself with clouds

[EXO 19:9](https://ref.ly/Exod19:9) · [JDG 5:4](https://ref.ly/Judg5:4) · [2SA 22:12](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:12) · [2SA 23:4](https://ref.ly/2Sam23:4) · [1KI 18:44](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:44) · [1KI 18:45](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:45) · [JOB 20:6](https://ref.ly/Job20:6) · [JOB 22:14](https://ref.ly/Job22:14) · [JOB 26:8](https://ref.ly/Job26:8) · [JOB 30:15](https://ref.ly/Job30:15) · [JOB 36:29](https://ref.ly/Job36:29) · [JOB 37:11](https://ref.ly/Job37:11) · [JOB 37:16](https://ref.ly/Job37:16) · [JOB 38:34](https://ref.ly/Job38:34) · [PSA 18:12](https://ref.ly/Ps18:12) · [PSA 18:13](https://ref.ly/Ps18:13) · [PSA 77:18](https://ref.ly/Ps77:18) · [PSA 104:3](https://ref.ly/Ps104:3) · [PSA 147:8](https://ref.ly/Ps147:8) · [PRO 16:15](https://ref.ly/Prov16:15) · [ECC 11:3](https://ref.ly/Eccl11:3) · [ECC 11:4](https://ref.ly/Eccl11:4) · [ECC 12:2](https://ref.ly/Eccl12:2) · [ISA 5:6](https://ref.ly/Isa5:6) · [ISA 14:14](https://ref.ly/Isa14:14) · [ISA 18:4](https://ref.ly/Isa18:4) · [ISA 19:1](https://ref.ly/Isa19:1) · [ISA 25:5](https://ref.ly/Isa25:5) · [ISA 44:22](https://ref.ly/Isa44:22) · [ISA 60:8](https://ref.ly/Isa60:8)

Buildings

canopy, overhang \= flat structure projecting from the roof or wall of a building or supported by pillars ► providing protection against sun, rain and wind

[1KI 7:6](https://ref.ly/1Kgs7:6) · [EZK 41:25](https://ref.ly/Ezek41:25) · [EZK 41:26](https://ref.ly/Ezek41:26)

Plants

thicket \= group of shrubs and trees, growing closely together; ► possible hiding place for people that do not want to be seen

[JER 4:29](https://ref.ly/Jer4:29)

Reinier de Blois

* **Associated Passages:** Exodus 19:9; Judges 5:4; 2 Samuel 22:12; 2 Samuel 23:4; 1 Kings 18:44; 1 Kings 18:45; Job 20:6; Job 22:14; Job 26:8; Job 30:15; Job 36:29; Job 37:11; Job 37:16; Job 38:34; Psalms 18:12; Psalms 18:13; Psalms 77:18; Psalms 104:3; Psalms 147:8; Proverbs 16:15; Ecclesiastes 11:3; Ecclesiastes 11:4; Ecclesiastes 12:2; Isaiah 5:6; Isaiah 14:14; Isaiah 18:4; Isaiah 19:1; Isaiah 25:5; Isaiah 44:22; Isaiah 60:8; 1 Kings 7:6; Ezekiel 41:25; Ezekiel 41:26; Jeremiah 4:29

Serve 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

Serve 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif

to make (someone) serve (someone else) \= causative action by which deities cause humans, either as individuals or as groups, to assume a position of subservience towards (other) individuals or groups, which normally accompanied by a number of duties, tasks and obligations

[JER 15:14](https://ref.ly/Jer15:14)1 · [JER 17:4](https://ref.ly/Jer17:4)

Serve 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

to serve, worship (a deity) \= action by which humans, either as individuals or as groups, assume a position of subservience towards a deity, perform the required rituals, and live in accordance with the requirements of that deity

Serve 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif

to make (someone) worship (a deity) \= causative action by which someone in authority causes humans, either as individuals or as groups, to assume a position of subservience towards a deity, perform the required rituals, and live in accordance with the requirements of that deity

[2CH 34:33](https://ref.ly/2Chr34:33)

Care 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal, verb nif, verb pu'al

to work, to till, to plow (soil, flax), to dress (a vineyard) literally, to "serve"; therefore \= action by which workers prepare land of planting and harvesting; also refers to caring for a vineyard, processing linen, or using cattle for working the land

[GEN 2:5](https://ref.ly/Gen2:5) · [GEN 2:15](https://ref.ly/Gen2:15) · [GEN 3:23](https://ref.ly/Gen3:23) · [GEN 4:2](https://ref.ly/Gen4:2) · [GEN 4:12](https://ref.ly/Gen4:12) · [DEU 15:19](https://ref.ly/Deut15:19) · [DEU 21:3](https://ref.ly/Deut21:3) · [DEU 21:4](https://ref.ly/Deut21:4) · [DEU 28:39](https://ref.ly/Deut28:39) · [2SA 9:10](https://ref.ly/2Sam9:10) · [PRO 12:11](https://ref.ly/Prov12:11) · [PRO 28:19](https://ref.ly/Prov28:19) · [ECC 5:8](https://ref.ly/Eccl5:8) · [ISA 19:9](https://ref.ly/Isa19:9) · [ISA 30:24](https://ref.ly/Isa30:24) · [EZK 36:9](https://ref.ly/Ezek36:9) · [EZK 36:34](https://ref.ly/Ezek36:34) · [EZK 48:19](https://ref.ly/Ezek48:19) · [ZEC 13:5](https://ref.ly/Zech13:5)

Diligent 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

to do work, to labor \= action or pattern of actions by which humans make a physical effort towards a certain goal

[GEN 29:20](https://ref.ly/Gen29:20) · [GEN 29:25](https://ref.ly/Gen29:25) · [GEN 29:27](https://ref.ly/Gen29:27) · [GEN 29:30](https://ref.ly/Gen29:30) · [EXO 5:18](https://ref.ly/Exod5:18) · [EXO 20:9](https://ref.ly/Exod20:9) · [EXO 34:21](https://ref.ly/Exod34:21) · [LEV 25:40](https://ref.ly/Lev25:40) · [DEU 5:13](https://ref.ly/Deut5:13) · [ECC 5:11](https://ref.ly/Eccl5:11) · [EZK 29:18](https://ref.ly/Ezek29:18) · [EZK 29:20](https://ref.ly/Ezek29:20) · [EZK 48:18](https://ref.ly/Ezek48:18) · [EZK 48:19](https://ref.ly/Ezek48:19) · [HOS 12:13](https://ref.ly/Hos12:13)

Diligent 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif

to cause (someone) to work, to make (someone) labor \= causative action by which humans cause other humans to make a physical effort towards a certain goal

[EXO 1:13](https://ref.ly/Exod1:13) · [EXO 6:5](https://ref.ly/Exod6:5) · [2CH 2:17](https://ref.ly/2Chr2:17) · [EZK 29:18](https://ref.ly/Ezek29:18)

Weak 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif

to burden literally: to cause (someone) to serve; hence: \= causative action by which deities cause humans to weary themselves out by making excessive demands

[ISA 43:23](https://ref.ly/Isa43:23) · [ISA 43:24](https://ref.ly/Isa43:24)

Serve 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

**Collocation:** עבד עֲבֹודָה

to carry out a task, to serve, to do work, to minister \= action by which a person provides a service ► for a specific purpose or on behalf of another

[GEN 30:26](https://ref.ly/Gen30:26) · [EXO 13:5](https://ref.ly/Exod13:5) · [NUM 3:7](https://ref.ly/Num3:7) · [NUM 3:8](https://ref.ly/Num3:8) · [NUM 4:23](https://ref.ly/Num4:23) · [NUM 4:24](https://ref.ly/Num4:24) · [NUM 4:26](https://ref.ly/Num4:26) · [NUM 4:30](https://ref.ly/Num4:30) · [NUM 4:37](https://ref.ly/Num4:37) · [NUM 4:41](https://ref.ly/Num4:41) · [NUM 4:47](https://ref.ly/Num4:47) · [NUM 7:5](https://ref.ly/Num7:5) · [NUM 8:11](https://ref.ly/Num8:11) · [NUM 8:15](https://ref.ly/Num8:15) · [NUM 8:19](https://ref.ly/Num8:19) · [NUM 8:22](https://ref.ly/Num8:22) · [NUM 8:25](https://ref.ly/Num8:25) · [NUM 8:26](https://ref.ly/Num8:26) · [NUM 16:9](https://ref.ly/Num16:9) · [NUM 18:6](https://ref.ly/Num18:6) · [NUM 18:7](https://ref.ly/Num18:7) · [NUM 18:21](https://ref.ly/Num18:21) · [NUM 18:23](https://ref.ly/Num18:23) · [JOS 22:27](https://ref.ly/Josh22:27) · [ISA 28:21](https://ref.ly/Isa28:21)

Serve 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal, verb pu'al

to make (someone) a slave or servant, to make (someone) serve or work, to enslave \= causative action by which someone in authority causes others to assume a position of subservience and carry out specific duties, tasks, and obligations

[EXO 1:14](https://ref.ly/Exod1:14) · [LEV 25:39](https://ref.ly/Lev25:39) · [LEV 25:46](https://ref.ly/Lev25:46) · [ISA 14:3](https://ref.ly/Isa14:3) · [JER 22:13](https://ref.ly/Jer22:13) · [JER 25:14](https://ref.ly/Jer25:14) · [JER 27:7](https://ref.ly/Jer27:7) · [JER 30:8](https://ref.ly/Jer30:8) · [JER 34:9](https://ref.ly/Jer34:9) · [JER 34:10](https://ref.ly/Jer34:10) · [EZK 34:27](https://ref.ly/Ezek34:27)

Classes 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal ptc.act

**Collocation:** מַס־עֹבֵד

slave, servant \= a person or group of persons forced to work or provide a service for others

[GEN 49:15](https://ref.ly/Gen49:15) · [JOS 16:10](https://ref.ly/Josh16:10) · [1KI 9:21](https://ref.ly/1Kgs9:21)

verb

Exist 

|  |
| --- |

 verb pe'al

to make, to create, to produce, to build \= causative action by which human or deities produce an object, either personally or by others on behalf of them

[JER 10:11](https://ref.ly/Jer10:11) · [DAN 3:1](https://ref.ly/Dan3:1) · [DAN 3:15](https://ref.ly/Dan3:15)

Engage 

|  |
| --- |

 verb pe'al, verb hitpe'el

to do, to perform, to commit, to practice, to observe, to celebrate, to keep \= action by which humans or deities engage in a particular action

[EZR 4:15](https://ref.ly/Ezra4:15) · [EZR 4:19](https://ref.ly/Ezra4:19) · [EZR 4:22](https://ref.ly/Ezra4:22) · [EZR 5:8](https://ref.ly/Ezra5:8) · [EZR 6:8](https://ref.ly/Ezra6:8) · [EZR 6:11](https://ref.ly/Ezra6:11)3 · [EZR 6:12](https://ref.ly/Ezra6:12) · [EZR 6:13](https://ref.ly/Ezra6:13) · [EZR 6:16](https://ref.ly/Ezra6:16) · [EZR 7:18](https://ref.ly/Ezra7:18) · [EZR 7:18](https://ref.ly/Ezra7:18) · [EZR 7:21](https://ref.ly/Ezra7:21) · [EZR 7:23](https://ref.ly/Ezra7:23) · [EZR 7:26](https://ref.ly/Ezra7:26) · [EZR 7:26](https://ref.ly/Ezra7:26) · [DAN 3:32](https://ref.ly/Dan3:32) · [DAN 4:32](https://ref.ly/Dan4:32) · [DAN 4:32](https://ref.ly/Dan4:32) · [DAN 5:1](https://ref.ly/Dan5:1) · [DAN 6:11](https://ref.ly/Dan6:11) · [DAN 6:23](https://ref.ly/Dan6:23) · [DAN 6:28](https://ref.ly/Dan6:28) · [DAN 7:21](https://ref.ly/Dan7:21)

Impact 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hitpe'el

to make into \= causative action by which humans turn an object into something else

[EZR 6:11](https://ref.ly/Ezra6:11)3 · [DAN 2:5](https://ref.ly/Dan2:5) · [DAN 3:29](https://ref.ly/Dan3:29)

1 JER 15:14 MT הַעְַבַרְתִּי NJPS "I will bring" \= עבר 2 JER 2:20 MT\-K אעבד \| MT\-Q אֶעְֶבוֹר \= עבר 3 EZR 6:11 MT נְוָלוּ יִתְעְַבֵד RSV NRSV ESV "shall be made a dunghill" NIV "is to be made a pile of rubble" NJB "to be reduced to a rubbish\-heap" REB "to be razed to the ground" GNT "to be made a rubbish heap" CEV "turned into a rubbish dump" \= \[2c] \| LXX "τὸ κατ´ ἐμὲ ποιηθήσεται" VUL "publicetur" NJPS "confiscated" \= \[2b]

## עֲבֵד (id: 005195000000000)

עֲבֵד
=====

עֲבֵד (A5649)

noun m

Classes 

|  |
| --- |

 Officials 

|  |
| --- |

 Serve

slave, servant, officer, official, subject, vassal \= man who is under the authority of someone else as that person's legal property, employee, subject, or vassal; or someone who presents himself as such when speaking to someone of importance or praying to God

[EZR 4:11](https://ref.ly/Ezra4:11) · [EZR 5:11](https://ref.ly/Ezra5:11) · [DAN 2:4](https://ref.ly/Dan2:4) · [DAN 2:7](https://ref.ly/Dan2:7) · [DAN 3:26](https://ref.ly/Dan3:26) · [DAN 3:28](https://ref.ly/Dan3:28) · [DAN 6:21](https://ref.ly/Dan6:21)

* **Associated Passages:** Ezra 4:11; Ezra 5:11; Daniel 2:4; Daniel 2:7; Daniel 3:26; Daniel 3:28; Daniel 6:21

Happen

Serve 

|  |
| --- |

 ≈ מְלָאכָה

Move 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif

to cause to pass \= causative action by which humans or deities cause (other) humans or animals to cross the distance between one place and another

Associate 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

**Collocation:** עבר בִּבְרִית

to enter into a covenant literally: to pass in a covenant; hence: \= action by which one party enters into a covenant with another

[DEU 29:11](https://ref.ly/Deut29:11)

Dead 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal 

|  |
| --- |

 ≈ גוע · מות

to pass away, to perish literally: to pass; hence: \= process by which humans come to the end of their lives

[JOB 34:20](https://ref.ly/Job34:20) · [JOB 36:12](https://ref.ly/Job36:12)

End 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

to pass, to be over literally: to pass; hence: \= process by which an event stops taking place

[GEN 50:4](https://ref.ly/Gen50:4) · [2SA 11:27](https://ref.ly/2Sam11:27) · [1KI 18:29](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:29) · [EST 1:19](https://ref.ly/Esth1:19) · [EST 9:27](https://ref.ly/Esth9:27) · [EST 9:28](https://ref.ly/Esth9:28) · [JOB 17:11](https://ref.ly/Job17:11) · [JOB 30:15](https://ref.ly/Job30:15) · [JOB 33:18](https://ref.ly/Job33:18) · [JOB 37:21](https://ref.ly/Job37:21) · [PSA 57:2](https://ref.ly/Ps57:2) · [PSA 90:4](https://ref.ly/Ps90:4) · [PRO 10:25](https://ref.ly/Prov10:25) · [SNG 2:11](https://ref.ly/Song2:11) · [ISA 26:20](https://ref.ly/Isa26:20) · [JER 8:20](https://ref.ly/Jer8:20) · [AMO 8:5](https://ref.ly/Amos8:5) · [ZEP 2:2](https://ref.ly/Zeph2:2)

Engage 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hit

to meddle literally: to pass by (an event); hence: \= action by which humans participate in an activity without being invited to do so

[PRO 26:17](https://ref.ly/Prov26:17)

Engage 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

to transgress, to disobey literally: to pass by (a command); hence: \= action by which humans engage in an activity that they should not engage in according to the law, a specific command from someone in authority, or the terms of a covenant

[NUM 14:41](https://ref.ly/Num14:41) · [NUM 22:18](https://ref.ly/Num22:18) · [NUM 24:13](https://ref.ly/Num24:13) · [DEU 17:2](https://ref.ly/Deut17:2) · [DEU 26:13](https://ref.ly/Deut26:13) · [JOS 7:11](https://ref.ly/Josh7:11) · [JOS 7:15](https://ref.ly/Josh7:15) · [JOS 23:16](https://ref.ly/Josh23:16) · [JDG 2:20](https://ref.ly/Judg2:20) · [1SA 15:24](https://ref.ly/1Sam15:24) · [2KI 18:12](https://ref.ly/2Kgs18:12) · [2CH 24:20](https://ref.ly/2Chr24:20) · [EST 3:3](https://ref.ly/Esth3:3) · [JOB 14:5](https://ref.ly/Job14:5) · [PSA 17:3](https://ref.ly/Ps17:3) · [PSA 104:9](https://ref.ly/Ps104:9) · [PSA 148:6](https://ref.ly/Ps148:6) · [PRO 8:29](https://ref.ly/Prov8:29) · [ISA 24:5](https://ref.ly/Isa24:5) · [JER 5:22](https://ref.ly/Jer5:22) · [JER 5:22](https://ref.ly/Jer5:22) · [JER 34:18](https://ref.ly/Jer34:18) · [DAN 9:11](https://ref.ly/Dan9:11) · [HOS 6:7](https://ref.ly/Hos6:7) · [HOS 8:1](https://ref.ly/Hos8:1)

Non\-Engage 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif, verb qal

to avert, to thwart literally: to cause to pass; hence: \= causative action by which humans, deities, or circumstances keep a particular event from taking place

[EST 8:3](https://ref.ly/Esth8:3) · [PSA 119:39](https://ref.ly/Ps119:39) · [JER 11:15](https://ref.ly/Jer11:15)

Non\-Engage 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif

to let go by literally: to cause to pass; hence: \= causative action by which humans allow a certain event to take place without interfering

[JER 46:17](https://ref.ly/Jer46:17)

Non\-Exist 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

to pass on, to vanish literally: to pass; hence: \= process by which humans disappear from a certain location

[PSA 37:36](https://ref.ly/Ps37:36) · [ISA 31:9](https://ref.ly/Isa31:9) · [JER 8:13](https://ref.ly/Jer8:13) · [NAM 1:12](https://ref.ly/Nah1:12) · [HAB 1:11](https://ref.ly/Hab1:11)

Non\-Exist 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif

to put away, to expel literally: to cause to pass; hence: \= causative actions by which deities or humans in a position of authority force other humans to leave a certain place

[1KI 15:12](https://ref.ly/1Kgs15:12) · [2CH 15:8](https://ref.ly/2Chr15:8) · [ZEC 13:2](https://ref.ly/Zech13:2)

Flow 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

to flow, to flow away, to sweep through literally: (liquids) pass; hence: \= process by which liquids flow from one place to another, either slowly or with great force

[JOB 6:15](https://ref.ly/Job6:15) · [JOB 11:16](https://ref.ly/Job11:16) · [PSA 124:4](https://ref.ly/Ps124:4) · [PSA 124:5](https://ref.ly/Ps124:5) · [SNG 5:5](https://ref.ly/Song5:5) · [SNG 5:13](https://ref.ly/Song5:13) · [ISA 8:8](https://ref.ly/Isa8:8) · [ISA 28:15](https://ref.ly/Isa28:15) · [ISA 28:18](https://ref.ly/Isa28:18) · [ISA 28:19](https://ref.ly/Isa28:19) · [ISA 28:19](https://ref.ly/Isa28:19) · [ISA 54:9](https://ref.ly/Isa54:9) · [JON 2:4](https://ref.ly/Jonah2:4) · [NAM 1:8](https://ref.ly/Nah1:8) · [HAB 3:10](https://ref.ly/Hab3:10)

Intense 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

**Collocation:** עבר רֹאשׁ

to overwhelm literally: to pass (one's) head; hence: \= process by which an event increases in intensity until it is stronger than a person can bear

[PSA 38:5](https://ref.ly/Ps38:5)

Intense 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

to overflow, to have no limit literally: to flow; hence: \= process by which a certain condition increases in intensity to the extent that it goes beyond its limits

[PSA 73:7](https://ref.ly/Ps73:7) · [JER 5:28](https://ref.ly/Jer5:28)

Innocent

to pass by, to spare literally: to pass by (people); hence: \= action by which deities decide not to hold people responsible for their evil behavior

[AMO 7:8](https://ref.ly/Amos7:8) · [AMO 8:2](https://ref.ly/Amos8:2)

Happen 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

to come over (someone) literally: (an event) passes (over someone); hence: \= process by which something happens to people

[NUM 5:14](https://ref.ly/Num5:14) · [NUM 5:14](https://ref.ly/Num5:14) · [NUM 5:30](https://ref.ly/Num5:30) · [1CH 29:30](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:30) · [JOB 13:13](https://ref.ly/Job13:13) · [PSA 88:17](https://ref.ly/Ps88:17) · [LAM 4:21](https://ref.ly/Lam4:21) · [EZK 5:17](https://ref.ly/Ezek5:17) · [EZK 14:17](https://ref.ly/Ezek14:17) · [NAM 3:19](https://ref.ly/Nah3:19)

Hear 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif

**Collocation:** עבר קוֹל

to issue a proclamation literally: to cause a voice to pass; hence: \= action by which a message is proclaimed in different places so that all can hear

[EXO 36:6](https://ref.ly/Exod36:6) · [2CH 30:5](https://ref.ly/2Chr30:5) · [2CH 36:22](https://ref.ly/2Chr36:22) · [EZR 1:1](https://ref.ly/Ezra1:1) · [EZR 10:7](https://ref.ly/Ezra10:7) · [NEH 8:15](https://ref.ly/Neh8:15)

Hear 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif

**Collocation:** עבר שׁוֹפָר

to sound the horn literally: to cause the horn to pass; hence: \= action by which people blow the horn for all the community to hear

[LEV 25:9](https://ref.ly/Lev25:9) · [LEV 25:9](https://ref.ly/Lev25:9)

Innocent 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

**Collocation:** עבר עַל־פֶּשַׁע

to overlook an offense literally: to pass over an offence; hence: \= action by which humans or deities choose not to hold someone responsible for a certain action

[PRO 19:11](https://ref.ly/Prov19:11) · [MIC 7:18](https://ref.ly/Mic7:18)

Innocent 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif

**Collocation:** עבר חַטָּאת · עבר עָוֹן · עבר רָעָה

to take away, to remit literally: to cause sin to pass; hence: \= action by which deities choose not to hold someone responsible for a certain sinful action

[2SA 12:13](https://ref.ly/2Sam12:13) · [2SA 24:10](https://ref.ly/2Sam24:10) · [1CH 21:8](https://ref.ly/1Chr21:8) · [JOB 7:21](https://ref.ly/Job7:21) · [ZEC 3:4](https://ref.ly/Zech3:4)

Know 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif

to spread (news) literally: to cause (information) to pass; hence: \= causative action by which humans cause others to know certain information

[1SA 2:24](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:24)

Non\-Possess 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif

Weapons

shield, buckler \= a flat, usually round, object; made of wood or metal; ► used in battle; held by a warrior in front of him as protection from the weapons of his opponent; relatively small and easy to maneuver

[PSA 46:10](https://ref.ly/Ps46:10)

Description

like particle linking an event to an object; \= relation indicating that the main argument of event X is comparable to object Y

Connection

until particle linking two objects, of which the first is not always listed explicitly; \= relation indicating that object X and object Y are at opposite ends of a range of similar objects

Exist

(resulting) into particle linking an event to an object; \= relation indicating that event X results in the existence of object Y

[1CH 12:23](https://ref.ly/1Chr12:23) · [MIC 1:7](https://ref.ly/Mic1:7)

Great

(attain) to particle linking an event to an object; \= relation indicating that event X results in a certain level of status for object Y

[2SA 23:19](https://ref.ly/2Sam23:19) · [1CH 11:21](https://ref.ly/1Chr11:21) · [DAN 8:11](https://ref.ly/Dan8:11)

Intense

**Collocation:** עַד לְמַעְלָה

steadily \= process by which an event gradually increases in intensity

[2CH 16:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr16:12) · [2CH 17:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr17:12) · [2CH 26:8](https://ref.ly/2Chr26:8)

Intense

**Collocation:** עד מְאֹד

very much, extremely \= state in which an event takes place with a strong intensity

[GEN 27:33](https://ref.ly/Gen27:33) · [GEN 27:34](https://ref.ly/Gen27:34) · [1SA 11:15](https://ref.ly/1Sam11:15) · [1SA 25:36](https://ref.ly/1Sam25:36) · [2SA 2:17](https://ref.ly/2Sam2:17) · [1KI 1:4](https://ref.ly/1Kgs1:4) · [2CH 16:14](https://ref.ly/2Chr16:14) · [PSA 38:7](https://ref.ly/Ps38:7) · [PSA 38:9](https://ref.ly/Ps38:9) · [PSA 119:8](https://ref.ly/Ps119:8) · [PSA 119:43](https://ref.ly/Ps119:43) · [PSA 119:51](https://ref.ly/Ps119:51) · [PSA 119:107](https://ref.ly/Ps119:107) · [ISA 64:8](https://ref.ly/Isa64:8) · [ISA 64:11](https://ref.ly/Isa64:11) · [LAM 5:22](https://ref.ly/Lam5:22) · [DAN 8:8](https://ref.ly/Dan8:8) · [DAN 11:25](https://ref.ly/Dan11:25)

Intense

**Collocation:** עַד מָוֶת

until death literally: until death; hence: \= state in which a certain emotion is felt with an extreme intensity

[JON 4:9](https://ref.ly/Jonah4:9)

Rejoice

**Collocation:** עַד לְשִׂמְחָה

joyfully \= state in which a certain event is performed with joy

[2CH 29:30](https://ref.ly/2Chr29:30)

Quantity

**Collocation:** עַד לָרוֹב

plenty \= state in which a group of objects is high in quantity

[2CH 31:10](https://ref.ly/2Chr31:10)

Involvement

either ... or particle linking two events; \= relation indicating that event X and event Y are at opposite ends of a range of similar events

[GEN 31:24](https://ref.ly/Gen31:24) · [GEN 31:29](https://ref.ly/Gen31:29) · [2SA 13:22](https://ref.ly/2Sam13:22)

Involvement

to particle linking an event to a participant; \= relation indicating that event X is focused on object Y

[NUM 23:18](https://ref.ly/Num23:18) · [JOL 2:12](https://ref.ly/Joel2:12) · [AMO 4:6](https://ref.ly/Amos4:6) · [AMO 4:8](https://ref.ly/Amos4:8) · [AMO 4:9](https://ref.ly/Amos4:9) · [AMO 4:10](https://ref.ly/Amos4:10) · [AMO 4:11](https://ref.ly/Amos4:11)

Affirmers

up to particle marking a phrase indicating that an event is taking place with a certain frequency; \= marker emphasizing the high frequence of an event

[1KI 22:16](https://ref.ly/1Kgs22:16) · [2KI 4:35](https://ref.ly/2Kgs4:35) · [2CH 18:15](https://ref.ly/2Chr18:15)

Urge

**Collocation:** עַד מְהֵרָה

swiftly particle marking a phrase indicating that an event is taking place at a relatively fast speed; \= marker emphasizing the relatively high speed of an event

[PSA 147:15](https://ref.ly/Ps147:15)

Restrictors

up to particle marking a phrase indicating a certain quantity; \= marker emphasizing that the quantity expressed will not be exceeded

[EZR 7:22](https://ref.ly/Ezra7:22) · [EZR 7:22](https://ref.ly/Ezra7:22) · [EZR 7:22](https://ref.ly/Ezra7:22) · [EZR 7:22](https://ref.ly/Ezra7:22) · [EST 5:3](https://ref.ly/Esth5:3) · [EST 5:6](https://ref.ly/Esth5:6) · [EST 7:2](https://ref.ly/Esth7:2) · [JOB 11:7](https://ref.ly/Job11:7) · [JOB 38:18](https://ref.ly/Job38:18) · [PRO 6:26](https://ref.ly/Prov6:26)

Restrictors

not even literally: up to one; particle marking a phrase indicating a certain quantity; \= marker emphasizing that not even the quantity expressed has been reached

witness read עֵד

forever, everlasting, for all times \= an adverb that specifies unending time

## עִדֹּא (id: 005246000000000)

עִדֹּא
======

עִדֹּא (H5714a)

name

Names of People

Iddo \= man; ► father of Ahinadab, official, time of king Solomon

[1KI 4:14](https://ref.ly/1Kgs4:14)

Reinier de Blois

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Kings 4:14


## עדה (id: 005247000000000)

עדה
===

עדה (A5709 · H5710)

verb · עַד

Move 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

to pass by, to cross \= action by which an animal passes through a certain area

[JOB 28:8](https://ref.ly/Job28:8)

End 

|  |
| --- |

 verb pe'al

to come to an end, to depart, to pass literally: to pass; hence: \= process by which a condition comes to an end

[DAN 4:28](https://ref.ly/Dan4:28) · [DAN 6:9](https://ref.ly/Dan6:9) · [DAN 6:13](https://ref.ly/Dan6:13) · [DAN 7:14](https://ref.ly/Dan7:14)

End 

|  |
| --- |

 verb haf'el

to bring to an end, to take away literally: to cause to pass; hence: \= causative process by which a condition is brought to an end

[DAN 5:20](https://ref.ly/Dan5:20) · [DAN 7:12](https://ref.ly/Dan7:12) · [DAN 7:26](https://ref.ly/Dan7:26)

Role 

|  |
| --- |

 verb haf'el

to depose literally: to remove (a king); hence: \= causative action by which a deity strips a leader from his position of authority

[DAN 2:21](https://ref.ly/Dan2:21)

Smell 

|  |
| --- |

 verb pe'al

**Collocation:** רֵיחַ נוּר עדה

an odor clings (to someone) literally: the odor of fire passes over (someone); hence: \= process by which humans are exposed to fire and smoke which clings to their body or clothes

[DAN 3:27](https://ref.ly/Dan3:27)

Undress 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif

to remove, to take off literally: to cause to pass; hence: \= action by which humans take off a piece of clothing

[PRO 25:20](https://ref.ly/Prov25:20)

verb · עֲדִי · מַעֲדַי · מַעַדְיָה

Dress 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

to adorn oneself, to deck oneself \= action by which humans put on jewellery and ornaments ► to enhance their beauty; ≈ often used figuratively to denote the covenant between God and Israel

[ISA 61:10](https://ref.ly/Isa61:10) · [JER 4:30](https://ref.ly/Jer4:30) · [EZK 16:13](https://ref.ly/Ezek16:13) · [EZK 23:40](https://ref.ly/Ezek23:40) · [HOS 2:15](https://ref.ly/Hos2:15)

Dress 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

to adorn, to deck \= causative action by which humans put jewellery and ornaments on other humans ► in order to enhance their beauty; ≈ only used figuratively to denote the covenant between God and Israel

[EZK 16:11](https://ref.ly/Ezek16:11)

Engage 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

to deck oneself (with a certain quality) literally: to adorn oneself; hence: \= action by which humans take on a certain quality ◄ as if by putting on jewellery

## עָוֹן (id: 005307000000000)

עָוֹן
=====

עָוֹן (H5771)

noun m · עוה

Sin 

|  |
| --- |

 Guilty 

|  |
| --- |

 Chastise 

|  |
| --- |

 ≈ אַשְׁמָה · חַטָּאָה · חַטָּאת · פֶּשַׁע

iniquity \= a deed of deliberate wrongdoing resulting in a state of guilt which requires punishment

## עזר (id: 005358000000000)

עזר
===

עזר (H5826) [SAHD](SAHD@http://www.sahd.div.ed.ac.uk/_media/lexeme:pdf:jgp-ʿazar-aitken_gray-cam-2014.pdf)

verb · עֵזֶר · עֲזָרָה · עֶזְרָה · יַעְזֵר · עֵזֶר · עֶזְרָא · עֲזַרְאֵל · עֶזְרָה · עֶזְרִי · עֲזַרְיָה

Safe 

|  |
| --- |

 verb nif

to be helped, to receive help \= process by which humans receive assistance or supported from other humans or deities

[1CH 5:20](https://ref.ly/1Chr5:20) · [2CH 26:15](https://ref.ly/2Chr26:15) · [PSA 28:7](https://ref.ly/Ps28:7) · [DAN 11:34](https://ref.ly/Dan11:34)

Safe 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal, verb hif

to help, to assist, to support \= action by which humans or deities provide assistance or support to (other) humans ► in order to make their life, work, task or situation easier (1\) When verb has a human subject, it is often used in a military or political\-national context, which connects with the substantive uses of the verb to refer to allies: 'helper'/'ally'. (2\) Is also used in a socio\-legal context, with both human and divine subjects, to refer to the activity of protecting or defending someone as 'defender'.

## עֲטַלֵּף (id: 005375000000000)

עֲטַלֵּף
========

עֲטַלֵּף (H5847)

noun m · עטף

Birds

bat \= mammal with a fur skin, and slender elongated forelegs and fingers that support a flap of skin joining its fingers to its toes, which functions as a wing and allows it to fly; they fly around at night and hang upside down from trees or overhanging rocks during the day; also found in caves, tombs, unoccupied houses, and old ruins; ◄ classified as a bird by ancient Israelites because of its ability to fly; ► unclean; ≈ associated with death, desolation, destruction, and witchcraft

[LEV 11:19](https://ref.ly/Lev11:19) · [DEU 14:18](https://ref.ly/Deut14:18) · [ISA 2:20](https://ref.ly/Isa2:20)

Reinier de Blois

* **Associated Passages:** Leviticus 11:19; Deuteronomy 14:18; Isaiah 2:20

## עֲיָם (id: 005395000000000)

עֲיָם
=====

עֲיָם (H5868) — בַּעְיָם

noun c

Strong

strength exact meaning unkown: \= state in which the wind is extremely powerful

[ISA 11:15](https://ref.ly/Isa11:15)

Hot

heat exact meaning unkown \= state in which the wind is exceedingly warm

[ISA 11:15](https://ref.ly/Isa11:15)

Reinier de Blois

* **Associated Passages:** Isaiah 11:15


## עין (id: 005396000000000)

עין
===

עין (H5770)

verb · עַיִן

See 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal, verb pi

to keep an eye on \= action by which humans watch the behavior of other humans with envy and distrust

[1SA 2:32](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:32)1 · [1SA 18:9](https://ref.ly/1Sam18:9)2

1 1SA 2:32 RSV "with envious eye" NJPS "grudgingly" NRSV "with greedy eye" GNT "with envy" \= מְעַוֵּן \| MT HTTP\-C NIV NJB מָעֹון "dwellling" 2 1SA 18:9 MT\-Q עֹויֵן \| MT\-K עָוֹן

Reinier de Blois

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Samuel 2:32; 1 Samuel 18:9


## עַיִן (id: 005397000000000)

עַיִן
=====

עַיִן (H5869a · H5869b · A5870 · H5871)

noun f · עין · אֶלְיְהֹועֵינַי · אֶלְיֹועֵינַי · עֵין גֶּדִי · עֵין גַּנִּים · עֵין דֹּור · עֵין הַתַּנִּין · עֵין חַדָּה · עֵין חָצֹור · עֵין חֲרֹד · עֵין מִשְׁפָּט · עֵין עֶגְלַיִם · עֵין רֹגֵל · עֵין רִמֹּון · עֵין שֶׁמֶשׁ · עֵינַיִם · עֵינָם · עֵינָן

eye \= one of two parts of the body of humans and animals that is used to see things, after which the observed information is stored and processed in the mind; sparkling when the body is healthy and strong, but dim when weak or sick; the eyes also play a significant role in determining whether a person is considered beautiful or not; eyes can reflect both an attitude of compassion and a sentiment of malice; ≈ high eyes are associated with pride, whereas lowly eyes are connected with humility; a good eye is associated with generosity, whereas an evil eye denotes stinginess; winking the eye is associated with underhanded practices

## עָיֵף (id: 005416000000000)

עָיֵף

adj · עיף

Weak 

|  |
| --- |

 ≈ דאב · חשׁל · יָגֵעַ

weary, faint, famished \= state in which humans and animals have lost their strength as a result of a prolonged period of exertion and the need for food, drink and rest

[GEN 25:29](https://ref.ly/Gen25:29) · [GEN 25:30](https://ref.ly/Gen25:30) · [DEU 25:18](https://ref.ly/Deut25:18) · [JDG 8:4](https://ref.ly/Judg8:4) · [JDG 8:5](https://ref.ly/Judg8:5) · [2SA 16:14](https://ref.ly/2Sam16:14) · [2SA 17:29](https://ref.ly/2Sam17:29) · [JOB 22:7](https://ref.ly/Job22:7) · [PRO 25:25](https://ref.ly/Prov25:25) · [ISA 5:27](https://ref.ly/Isa5:27) · [ISA 28:12](https://ref.ly/Isa28:12) · [ISA 29:8](https://ref.ly/Isa29:8) · [ISA 46:1](https://ref.ly/Isa46:1) · [JER 31:25](https://ref.ly/Jer31:25)

Dry

dry, parched literally: (land is) weary, faint, famished; hence: \= state in which land is dry and desperately in need of water

 ≈ אַף · בֶּהָלָה · חָרֹון

## עֹל (id: 005445000000000)

עֹל
===

עֹל (H5923)

noun m · עלל · עֻלָּא

Tools

yoke, oppression, bondage \= bar or frame ◄ normally made of wood ► used to join two draft animals at the neck so that they can work together effectively in pulling a plow, threshing board, harrow, or wagon; ≈ often used in a figurative sense to denote oppression

Move 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif, verb qal, verb nif, verb hof

to bring up \= causative action by which humans or deities cause (other) humans or objects to go to a place that is situated at a higher elevation, by foot or carried by hand, or with the help of a vehicle

Move 

|  |
| --- |

 verb nif

to withdraw \= action by which humans move away from a certain location

[NUM 16:24](https://ref.ly/Num16:24) · [NUM 16:27](https://ref.ly/Num16:27) · [2SA 2:27](https://ref.ly/2Sam2:27) · [JER 37:5](https://ref.ly/Jer37:5) · [JER 37:11](https://ref.ly/Jer37:11)

Alive 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif

to raise up literally: to bring up; hence: \= causative action by which deities bring humans back to life

[1SA 2:6](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:6) · [EZK 37:12](https://ref.ly/Ezek37:12) · [EZK 37:13](https://ref.ly/Ezek37:13)

Conflict 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

**Collocation:** יָד עלה

to attack literally: (one's) hand goes up (against someone else's hand); hence: \= action by which one human behaves aggressively toward another

[ZEC 14:13](https://ref.ly/Zech14:13)

Contain 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif

to put in literally: to cause to go (in); \= process by which humans provide a certain amount of raw materials to be used to produce an artifact

[1KI 10:16](https://ref.ly/1Kgs10:16) · [1KI 10:17](https://ref.ly/1Kgs10:17) · [2CH 9:15](https://ref.ly/2Chr9:15) · [2CH 9:16](https://ref.ly/2Chr9:16)

Cover 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

to come over literally: to go up; hence: \= process by which an object appears on top of or over another one

[NUM 19:2](https://ref.ly/Num19:2) · [JDG 13:5](https://ref.ly/Judg13:5) · [JDG 16:17](https://ref.ly/Judg16:17) · [1SA 1:11](https://ref.ly/1Sam1:11) · [1SA 6:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam6:7) · [PRO 24:31](https://ref.ly/Prov24:31) · [ISA 34:13](https://ref.ly/Isa34:13) · [LAM 1:14](https://ref.ly/Lam1:14) · [EZK 37:8](https://ref.ly/Ezek37:8)

Cover 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif

to cover literally: to cause to go up; hence: \= causative process by which an object is caused to appear on top of or over another one

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

to wear literally: to go up; hence: \= process by which people are dressed with certain clothes

Exist 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

to appear literally: to come up; hence: \= process by which objects come into existence that were not known to exist before

Exist 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif

to make appear literally: to cause to come up; hence: \= causative process by which objects are caused to come into existence that were not known to exist before

[EXO 8:1](https://ref.ly/Exod8:1) · [EXO 8:3](https://ref.ly/Exod8:3)

Flow

 verb qal

to spring up literally: to come up; hence: \= process by which water bursts forth from the ground and starts flowing

[NUM 21:17](https://ref.ly/Num21:17)

Great 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal, verb nif

to ascend, to rise (in status) literally: to come up; hence: \= process by which humans or deities increase in status and importance

 verb qal

to come, to approach literally: to come up; hence: \= state by which an event is about to happen

Happen 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif

to bring upon literally: to bring (upon); hence: \= causative process by which deities cause certain events to happen to others

 verb qal

Hold

 verb qal

Ingest

| --- |

 verb hif

**Collocation:** עלה גֵּרָה

to chew the cud literally: to bring up the cud; hence: \= causative action by which a ruminant animal brings up partly digested food from the stomach in order to chew it more

## עִלָּה (id: 005450000000000)

עִלָּה
======

עִלָּה (A5931)

noun f · עלל

Wrong

wrong, wickedness, injustice \= actions that are considered wrong in a general sense

[DAN 6:5](https://ref.ly/Dan6:5) · [DAN 6:5](https://ref.ly/Dan6:5) · [DAN 6:6](https://ref.ly/Dan6:6)

Reinier de Blois

* **Associated Passages:** Daniel 6:5; Daniel 6:6


## עָלֶה (id: 005451000000000)

עָלֶה
=====

עָלֶה (H5929)

noun m · עלה

Trees

leaf \= one of the expanded, usually green structures growing from the stem of a plant; ► providing shade; ≈ associated with life when green, but known to wither when disconnected from the plant and therefore also denoting the fragility of life

## עֹלָה (id: 005452000000000)

עֹלָה
=====

עֹלָה (H5930) — עֹולָה

noun f · עלה

Sacrifice

burnt\-offering \= action by which humans offer a living creature to a deity by killing it and burning it in (almost) its entirety on the altar; ≈ considered to have a pleasing aroma

scoundrels, evildoers literally: sons of injustice; hence: \= people that are engaged in unjust behavior

name

noun f

burnt offering \= action by which humans offer a living creature to a deity by killing it and burning it in (almost) its entirety on the altar; ≈ considered to have a pleasing aroma

[EZR 6:9](https://ref.ly/Ezra6:9)

עלף

verb · עֻלְפֶּה

Weak

[ISA 51:20](https://ref.ly/Isa51:20) · [AMO 8:13](https://ref.ly/Amos8:13) · [JON 4:8](https://ref.ly/Jonah4:8)

verb

Cover 

|  |
| --- |

 verb pu'al

to be covered \= state in which a substance is covered by a variety of objects

[SNG 5:14](https://ref.ly/Song5:14)

Dress 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hit

to veil oneself, to disguise oneself exact meaning unsure; possibly: \= action by which humans wrap a piece of cloth around their body, ► possibly to avoid being recognized

[GEN 38:14](https://ref.ly/Gen38:14)

## עמד (id: 005492000000000)

עמד
===

עמד (H5975 · H5976)

verb · מַעֲמָד · מָעֳמָד · עֹמֶד · עֶמְדָּה · עַמּוּד

Stance 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

to stand, to stand still, to stop \= process by which humans, deities, animals, or inanimate objects take position in a certain location in an upright position

## עֹמֶד (id: 005494000000000)

עֹמֶד
=====

עֹמֶד (H5977)

noun m · עמד

Space

place, position literally: standing; hence: \= a place where humans stand, either by choice or by assignment

[2CH 30:16](https://ref.ly/2Chr30:16) · [2CH 34:31](https://ref.ly/2Chr34:31) · [2CH 35:10](https://ref.ly/2Chr35:10) · [NEH 8:7](https://ref.ly/Neh8:7) · [NEH 9:3](https://ref.ly/Neh9:3) · [NEH 13:11](https://ref.ly/Neh13:11) · [DAN 8:17](https://ref.ly/Dan8:17) · [DAN 8:18](https://ref.ly/Dan8:18) · [DAN 10:11](https://ref.ly/Dan10:11)

Strong

(taking a) stand literally: standing; hence: \= state in which supernatural beings rally and show their strength

[DAN 11:1](https://ref.ly/Dan11:1)

noun m

Names of Locations

Emek\-Keziz, Valley of Keziz, Keziz Valley \= town; ◄ territory of Benjamin

[JOS 18:21](https://ref.ly/Josh18:21)

עֲמַר

עֲמַר (A6015)

noun m

Cloth

 verb qal, verb pi

Insignificant 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hit, verb nif

to humble oneself, to submit literally: to bow down; hence: \= action by which humans put themselves in a lowered status or position with respect to other humans or deities

[GEN 16:9](https://ref.ly/Gen16:9) · [EXO 10:3](https://ref.ly/Exod10:3) · [1KI 2:26](https://ref.ly/1Kgs2:26) · [EZR 8:21](https://ref.ly/Ezra8:21) · [DAN 10:12](https://ref.ly/Dan10:12)

Non\-Ingest 

|  |
| --- |

 verb pi, verb pu'al

**Collocation:** ענה נֶפֶשׁ

to humble oneself by fasting literally: to humble (one's) self; hence: \= action by which humans refrain from ingesting food ► and so humiliate themselves before a deity

Sex 

|  |
| --- |

 verb pi

to violate, to force (someone) to have sex, to rape \= causative action by which a man forces himself upon a woman and has non\-consensual sex with her ► and so brings humiliation upon her

[GEN 34:2](https://ref.ly/Gen34:2) · [DEU 21:14](https://ref.ly/Deut21:14) · [DEU 22:24](https://ref.ly/Deut22:24) · [DEU 22:29](https://ref.ly/Deut22:29) · [JDG 19:24](https://ref.ly/Judg19:24) · [JDG 20:5](https://ref.ly/Judg20:5) · [2SA 13:12](https://ref.ly/2Sam13:12) · [2SA 13:14](https://ref.ly/2Sam13:14) · [2SA 13:22](https://ref.ly/2Sam13:22) · [2SA 13:32](https://ref.ly/2Sam13:32) · [LAM 5:11](https://ref.ly/Lam5:11) · [EZK 22:10](https://ref.ly/Ezek22:10) · [EZK 22:11](https://ref.ly/Ezek22:11)

Non\-Engage 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

to be stilled literally: to be bowed down; hence: \= process by which an activity is forcefully put to an end

[ISA 25:5](https://ref.ly/Isa25:5)

Unsafe 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal, verb nif, verb hit

to be afflicted, to be bothered, to be daunted literally: to be bowed down; hence: \= state in which humans are suffering hardship and trouble and unable to help themselves

[1KI 2:26](https://ref.ly/1Kgs2:26) · [PSA 107:17](https://ref.ly/Ps107:17) · [PSA 116:10](https://ref.ly/Ps116:10) · [PSA 119:67](https://ref.ly/Ps119:67) · [PSA 119:107](https://ref.ly/Ps119:107) · [ISA 31:4](https://ref.ly/Isa31:4) · [ISA 53:7](https://ref.ly/Isa53:7) · [ISA 58:10](https://ref.ly/Isa58:10) · [ZEC 10:2](https://ref.ly/Zech10:2)

Unsafe 

|  |
| --- |

 verb pi, verb hif, verb pu'al

to afflict, to oppress, to make helpless literally: to bow down; hence: \= causative action in which a humans or deities cause (other) humans to suffer hardship and trouble, ► resulting in a state of inability to help oneself

verb · עֹנָה · עִנְיָן

Engage 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

to be busy (with), to be concerned (about) \= state in which humans are physically and mentally preoccupied with a responsibility or task ◄ often assigned to them by God

[ECC 1:13](https://ref.ly/Eccl1:13) · [ECC 3:10](https://ref.ly/Eccl3:10)

Engage 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif

to keep (one) occupied, busy \= causative action by which God keeps humans concerned about or preoccupied with a situation or responsibility

 Crops

 ≈ חָלָב · יַיִן · מַיִם

must, fresh wine \= dark red alcoholic liquid; ◄ made out of grapes through the process of fermentation and probably still relatively fresh; ► used as beverage; ≈ associated with agriculture, joy, and well\-being, but also with drunkenness; also used in metaphors for aggression and sex

noun m · עפל

Impact 

|  |

 ≈ גָּרָב · חֶרֶס · טְחֹרִים · שְׁחִין

tumor always as K of טְחֹרִים; exact meaning uncertain: \= swelling of internal parts of the body or sores; ◄ probably due to an infectious disease such as dysentery or bubonic plague; ≈ regarded as painful, enfeebling and threatening to a community

Trees 

|  |
| --- |

 ≈ הֲדַס · זַיִת · תָּמָר

**Collocation:** עֵץ שֶׁמֶן

pine tree, olive tree, olive wood \= an evergreen conifer that grows to a height of 20 meters and can live as long as 150 years; ◄ Pinus halepensis; Aleppo pine; ► the wood is suitable for carpentry work, and the leaves for building booths. Or alternatively, olive tree ("oil tree")

[1KI 6:23](https://ref.ly/1Kgs6:23) · [1KI 6:31](https://ref.ly/1Kgs6:31) · [1KI 6:32](https://ref.ly/1Kgs6:32) · [1KI 6:33](https://ref.ly/1Kgs6:33) · [NEH 8:15](https://ref.ly/Neh8:15) · [ISA 41:19](https://ref.ly/Isa41:19)

Constructions

gallows, tower (for hanging) \= a wooden construction used to execute criminals by hanging

## עצב (id: 005598000000000)

עצב
===

עצב (H6087)

verb · מַעֲצֵבָה · עֶצֶב · עַצָּב · עִצָּבֹון · עַצֶּבֶת · עֲצִיב

Impact 

|  |
| --- |

 verb nif

to be hurt \= process by which humans are physically hurt

[ECC 10:9](https://ref.ly/Eccl10:9)

Fail 

|  |
| --- |

 verb pi

to frustrate literally: to hurt; hence: \= causative action by which humans try to cause the activities of other humans to fail

[PSA 56:6](https://ref.ly/Ps56:6)

Grieve 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal, verb nif, verb hit

Bear 

|  |

 verb qal

Confident

 verb qal

 verb qal

Non\-Possess

======

עֵשֶׂב (H6212)

noun m

Crops

grass, green plant, vegetation, herbage \= any of various plants, herbs, grasses, seed\-bearing vegetation that can be consumed by humans and animals; ≈ associated with both abundance and things that do not last

## עשׂה (id: 005707000000000)

עשׂה
====

עשׂה (H6213)

verb · מַעֲשֶׂה · עֲשָׂהאֵל

Exist

to make, to create, to produce, to build \= causative action by which human or deities produce an object, either personally or by others on behalf of them

Engage 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal, verb nif

to do, to perform, to commit, to practice, to observe, to celebrate, to keep \= action by which humans or deities engage in a particular action

Divination 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal

**Collocation:** עשׂה אֹוב וְיִדְּעֹונִי

to deal with spirits of the dead and mediums \= action by which humans consult the spirits of deceased persons, either directly or through the intermediary of a professional; ≈ an activity forbidden in the law of Moses

[2KI 21:6](https://ref.ly/2Kgs21:6) · [2CH 33:6](https://ref.ly/2Chr33:6)

Happen 

|  |
| --- |

 verb nif, verb qal

to happen literally: to be done; hence: \= process by which certain events take place without observers always having a clear understanding of who is the agent

 verb qal

 verb qal

**Collocation:** עשׂה חַיִל

to do valiantly, to act bravely literally: to do substantially; hence: \= action as a result of which humans or deities are deemed worthy of respect, because of characteristics such as physical strength, power, bravery, skill, wealth, good character, or a combination thereof

Great

עֲשָׂהאֵל
=========

עֲשָׂהאֵל (H6214)

name · עשׂה · אֵל

Names of People

Asahel \= man; ◄ son of Zeruiah, sister of David; ► warrior

Asahel \= man; ► Levite; time of king Jehoshaphat

Names of People

Asahel \= man; ► official; time of king Hezekiah

[LEV 5:23](https://ref.ly/Lev5:23) · [PSA 62:11](https://ref.ly/Ps62:11) · [ECC 5:7](https://ref.ly/Eccl5:7) · [ECC 7:7](https://ref.ly/Eccl7:7) · [JER 22:17](https://ref.ly/Jer22:17) · [EZK 18:18](https://ref.ly/Ezek18:18) · [EZK 22:7](https://ref.ly/Ezek22:7) · [EZK 22:12](https://ref.ly/Ezek22:12) · [EZK 22:29](https://ref.ly/Ezek22:29)

Unsafe 

|  |
| --- |

 ≈ חָמָס · לוז · סָרָה

oppression, wrongdoing literally: extortion, abuse; hence: \= action by which humans mistreat other humans in ways that are not elaborated

[PSA 73:8](https://ref.ly/Ps73:8) · [PSA 119:134](https://ref.ly/Ps119:134) · [ISA 30:12](https://ref.ly/Isa30:12) · [ISA 54:14](https://ref.ly/Isa54:14) · [ISA 59:13](https://ref.ly/Isa59:13) · [JER 6:6](https://ref.ly/Jer6:6)

Reinier de Blois

* **Associated Passages:** Leviticus 5:23; Psalms 62:11; Ecclesiastes 5:7; Ecclesiastes 7:7; Jeremiah 22:17; Ezekiel 18:18; Ezekiel 22:7; Ezekiel 22:12; Ezekiel 22:29; Psalms 73:8; Psalms 119:134; Isaiah 30:12; Isaiah 54:14; Isaiah 59:13; Jeremiah 6:6


## עָשְׁקָה (id: 005727000000000)

עָשְׁקָה
========

עָשְׁקָה (H6234)

noun f · עשׁק

Grieve

troubled, in straits literally: suffering oppression, wrongdoing; hence: \= process by which humans suffer hardship, ≈ possibly with the connotation that this hardship is suffered unjustly

[ISA 38:14](https://ref.ly/Isa38:14)

Reinier de Blois

* **Associated Passages:** Isaiah 38:14


## עשׂר (id: 005729000000000)

עשׂר
====

עשׂר (H6237)

verb · מַעֲשֵׂר · עָשֹׂור · עֲשִׂירִי · עֶשֶׂר · עָשָׂר · עִשָּׂרֹון

Possess 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal, verb pi, verb hif

to take the tenth, to receive tithes \= action by which humans the tenth part of something

[1SA 8:15](https://ref.ly/1Sam8:15) · [1SA 8:17](https://ref.ly/1Sam8:17) · [NEH 10:38](https://ref.ly/Neh10:38) · [NEH 10:39](https://ref.ly/Neh10:39)

Non\-Possess 

|  |
| --- |

 verb pi, verb hif

to give the tenth, to give tithes \= action by which humans give the tenth part of something to someone else

[GEN 28:22](https://ref.ly/Gen28:22) · [GEN 28:22](https://ref.ly/Gen28:22) · [DEU 14:22](https://ref.ly/Deut14:22) · [DEU 14:22](https://ref.ly/Deut14:22) · [DEU 26:12](https://ref.ly/Deut26:12)

Reinier de Blois

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Samuel 8:15; 1 Samuel 8:17; Nehemiah 10:38; Nehemiah 10:39; Genesis 28:22; Deuteronomy 14:22; Deuteronomy 26:12


## עשׁר (id: 005728000000000)

עשׁר
====

עשׁר (H6238)

verb · עָשִׁיר · עֹשֶׁר

Rich 

|  |
| --- |

 verb qal, verb hif

to be rich, to become rich \= process by which humans obtain material wealth

[JOB 15:29](https://ref.ly/Job15:29) · [PSA 49:17](https://ref.ly/Ps49:17) · [PRO 21:17](https://ref.ly/Prov21:17) · [PRO 23:4](https://ref.ly/Prov23:4) · [PRO 28:20](https://ref.ly/Prov28:20) · [JER 5:27](https://ref.ly/Jer5:27) · [DAN 11:2](https://ref.ly/Dan11:2) · [HOS 12:9](https://ref.ly/Hos12:9) · [ZEC 11:5](https://ref.ly/Zech11:5)

Rich 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hit

to pretend to be rich \= action by which humans act as if they possess material wealth

[PRO 13:7](https://ref.ly/Prov13:7)

Rich 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif

to make rich, to enrich \= causative process by which humans or deities cause (other) humans to obtain material wealth

[GEN 14:23](https://ref.ly/Gen14:23) · [1SA 2:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:7) · [1SA 17:25](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:25) · [PRO 10:4](https://ref.ly/Prov10:4) · [PRO 10:22](https://ref.ly/Prov10:22) · [EZK 27:33](https://ref.ly/Ezek27:33)

Good 

|  |
| --- |

 verb hif

to enrich, to enhance literally: to make rich, enrich; hence: \= causative process by which deities enhance the quality of an object

[PSA 65:10](https://ref.ly/Ps65:10)

Reinier de Blois

## עֹשֶׁר (id: 005733000000000)

עֹשֶׁר
======

עֹשֶׁר (H6239)

noun m · עשׁר

Rich

wealth, riches \= state in which humans possess material wealth, ≈ which is usually associated with a high status and considered a blessing from God

Time

**Collocation:** בְּכָל־עֵת

always literally: at all time; \= a long stretch of time, without any interruptions

[EXO 18:22](https://ref.ly/Exod18:22) · [EXO 18:26](https://ref.ly/Exod18:26) · [LEV 16:2](https://ref.ly/Lev16:2) · [EST 5:13](https://ref.ly/Esth5:13) · [JOB 27:10](https://ref.ly/Job27:10) · [PSA 10:5](https://ref.ly/Ps10:5) · [PSA 34:2](https://ref.ly/Ps34:2) · [PSA 62:9](https://ref.ly/Ps62:9) · [PSA 106:3](https://ref.ly/Ps106:3) · [PSA 119:20](https://ref.ly/Ps119:20) · [PRO 5:19](https://ref.ly/Prov5:19) · [PRO 6:14](https://ref.ly/Prov6:14) · [PRO 8:30](https://ref.ly/Prov8:30) · [PRO 17:17](https://ref.ly/Prov17:17) · [ECC 9:8](https://ref.ly/Eccl9:8)

Time

**Collocation:** כָּעֵת

now \= a reference to the actual time when a particular event takes place

[NUM 23:23](https://ref.ly/Num23:23) · [JDG 13:23](https://ref.ly/Judg13:23) · [JDG 21:22](https://ref.ly/Judg21:22)

Time

**Collocation:** כְּמֹו עֵת

now \= a reference to the actual time when a particular event takes place

[EZK 16:57](https://ref.ly/Ezek16:57)

Time

**Collocation:** כָּעֵת חַיָּה

this time next year literally: in accordance to the living time; hence: \= a reference to the time exactly one year after a particular event takes place

[GEN 18:10](https://ref.ly/Gen18:10) · [GEN 18:14](https://ref.ly/Gen18:14) · [2KI 4:16](https://ref.ly/2Kgs4:16) · [2KI 4:17](https://ref.ly/2Kgs4:17)

Time

**Collocation:** כָּעֵת מָחָר

this time tomorrow literally: in accordance to the time of tomorrow; hence: \= a reference to the time exactly 24 hours after a particular event takes place

[EXO 9:18](https://ref.ly/Exod9:18) · [1SA 9:16](https://ref.ly/1Sam9:16) · [1SA 20:12](https://ref.ly/1Sam20:12) · [1KI 19:2](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:2) · [1KI 20:6](https://ref.ly/1Kgs20:6) · [2KI 7:1](https://ref.ly/2Kgs7:1) · [2KI 7:18](https://ref.ly/2Kgs7:18) · [2KI 10:6](https://ref.ly/2Kgs10:6)

Time

**Collocation:** לְעֵת־יֹום בְּיֹום

day in day out literally: to the time of day at day; hence: \= a reference to subsequent days over a longer stretch of time

[1CH 12:23](https://ref.ly/1Chr12:23)

Time

**Collocation:** מֵעֵת אֶל־עֵת

from time to time, regularly, at fixed times literally: from time to time; hence: \= a reference to relatively short uniform intervals

[1CH 9:25](https://ref.ly/1Chr9:25) · [1CH 9:25](https://ref.ly/1Chr9:25)

Time

**Collocation:** מֵעֵת עַד־עֵת

from time to time, regularly, at fixed times literally: from time to time; hence: \= a reference to relatively short uniform intervals

[EZK 4:10](https://ref.ly/Ezek4:10) · [EZK 4:10](https://ref.ly/Ezek4:10) · [EZK 4:11](https://ref.ly/Ezek4:11) · [EZK 4:11](https://ref.ly/Ezek4:11)

Events

events, fate \= a range of important events happening in a certain period of time

Happen

time \= an instance of something happening or being done
